india_trends.title: Silver slides Rs 3,300/kg, gold drops Rs 1,600/10g as Trump-Xi talks in spotlight amid Iran war; key levels to watch
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices opened sharply lower on MCX Thursday as markets tracked ongoing Trump-Xi talks and developments in the Iran conflict. india_trends.title: Sensex rises over 400 points to cross 75,000; Nifty above 23,500 despite weak rupee
india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets are on the rise for a second day. Sensex and Nifty opened higher on Thursday. This is happening even as oil prices remain high and the rupee nears a record low. Bharti Airtel shares are leading the gains. Other sectors like Pharma and Metal are also performing well.

india_trends.title: Tata Motors share price tanks 7% from day's high stellar Q4 results 2026: Should you buy, sell or hold Tata Group stock?
india_trends.summary: Tata Motors shares fell over 7% from day's high despite reporting a 69.56% rise in Q4FY26 net profit to ₹2,406 crore. Revenue increased 22% to ₹24,452 crore. The company declared a dividend of ₹4 per share, pending shareholder approval at the AGM.

india_trends.title: Silver rate today in India falls over 1% to ₹2.96 lakh/kg on profit booking; Donald Trump-Xi Jinping talks in focus
india_trends.summary: Silver prices in India fell 1.2% to ₹2,96,213 per kg on May 14 due to profit booking after a previous surge. This decline follows the Indian government's decision to increase import tariffs on gold and silver to 15%, aimed at protecting the rupee.

india_trends.title: Gold rate drops on MCX due to profit booking; Trump-Xi talk, US-Iran news flows in focus
india_trends.summary: Gold rates on the MCX fell on Thursday morning amid profit booking. Markets' focus is on the ongoing talks between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping.
